config.enable_logging.title: Enable logging
config.enable_logging.tooltip: When this setting is enabled, log messages will appear in the console.
config.minimum_level.notice: Important: This setting does not affect players who have already learned the Cask recipe. It only affects those who have not yet reached it.
config.minimum_level.tooltip: The minimum level of this skill needed to unlock the Cask recipe. Set to 0 to disable this skill.
log.requirements_not_met_unlocked: {0} already has the Cask recipe, but current requirements are higher. The recipe will NOT be removed.
